scripts.deploy:sepolia: cd contracts && source ../.env && forge clean && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url $ETH_SEPOLIA_RPC --account default --broadcast --verify --etherscan-api-key $ETHERSCAN_API_KEY
scripts.approve:sepolia: cd contracts && source ../.env && cast send $ENS_REGISTRY_ADDRESS "setApprovalForAll(address,bool)" $VITE_REGISTRAR_ADDRESS true --rpc-url $ETH_SEPOLIA_RPC --account default
scripts.codegen: cd contracts && forge build && cd ../app && bunx wagmi generate
